tool.name: megamerger
tool.summary: Merge two overlapping DNA sequences by longest exact suffix/prefix overlap

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `megamerger` performs a DNA-only exact overlap merge between one left record and one right record. The first Epithema release keeps the method intentionally narrow: it searches only for the longest positive exact overlap between the left suffix and right prefix and emits one merged DNA sequence record.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current interface accepts two local FASTA-style sequence inputs. Each input must contain exactly one record, and both records must be inferred as DNA. Protein, RNA, multi-record, and provider-backed inputs are rejected in the current v1 service path.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The tool emits one merged DNA FASTA sequence record. CLI summaries report the left and right source inputs, the overlap length used, the exact-overlap merge rule, the DNA-only molecule policy, and FASTA output format.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `epithema megamerger`. Validation currently covers a deterministic one-record DNA overlap merge against committed FASTA fixtures, and Rust tool tests also exercise explicit non-DNA rejection.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The first release does not implement approximate overlap finding, ambiguity-tolerant alignment, reverse-complement exploration, or scaffold graph operations. It is a DNA-only exact-overlap join rather than a broader assembly tool.

artifacts.label: Left DNA overlap FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed left DNA input fixture ending with the exact overlap used for deterministic megamerger validation.

artifacts.label: Right DNA overlap FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed right DNA input fixture beginning with the exact overlap used for deterministic megamerger validation.

examples.title: Merge two one-record DNA FASTA inputs by exact overlap
examples.description: Runs `megamerger` against committed DNA overlap fixtures and emits one merged DNA sequence record.

expected_outputs.label: Merged DNA sequence record
expected_outputs.description: A DNA FASTA sequence record with residues `ACGTAAGGG` and an overlap length of `3` reported in the CLI summary.
